<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/diff. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\Diff\Output; /** * Defines how an output builder should take a generated * diff array and return a string representation of that diff. */ interface DiffOutputBuilderInterface { public function getDiff(array $diff): string; }
